commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b4bf04d24d0f24f4f2f7d10abb684d4d15ca3835)
commands.review_summary:
The PR treats filtered explicit `NO_REPLY` assistant output as a successful `silent-empty` terminal result and adds helper, full-runner, error-guard, and fallback-classifier regression tests.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +109. Total +117 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main filters an exact `NO_REPLY` payload before terminal completion and can consequently enter empty-response retry and model fallback. The PR also supplies a focused before-fix failing assertion, though no independent live provider reproduction was run in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code blocker has a narrow mechanical repair on the PR branch; contributor-supplied live behavior proof remains a separate merge gate.

target.title: fix: handle explicit silent assistant replies
target.body:
## Summary

- Treat explicit terminal `NO_REPLY` assistant text as the existing successful `silent-empty` outcome when silent replies are allowed.
- Preserve the existing safeguards for errored assistant turns, committed delivery, side effects, and post-tool empty stops.
- Add regression coverage for exact `NO_REPLY` runner behavior and fallback classification so silent turns do not become format failures.
- Intentionally out of scope: live Zai/provider credential testing and changing the payload filter itself.

## Linked context

Closes #92038

Related #80535, #71516, #60607, #74034

Requested by maintainer discussion on #92038.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Explicit terminal `NO_REPLY` assistant replies are treated as successful silent turns instead of being dropped to an empty terminal result that can trigger retry/fallback handling.
- Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox on Linux, `provider=blacksmith-testbox`, `id=tbx_01ktt7d1exd9vma7wrq1enmcmp`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27319310794
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts --testNamePattern "exact NO_REPLY assistant turns|exact silent assistant replies|error or side-effect empty turns|post-tool openai-compatible empty stop|deliberate silent terminal replies" --reporter dot
```

- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): Testbox synced the branch changes and reported `Test Files 3 passed (3)`, `Tests 9 passed | 236 skipped (245)`, `exitCode=0`. Timing JSON: `{"provider":"blacksmith-testbox","leaseId":"tbx_01ktt7d1exd9vma7wrq1enmcmp","syncDelegated":true,"commandMs":140447,"totalMs":151595,"exitCode":0}`.
- Observed result after fix: The exact `NO_REPLY` runner path returns a silent terminal reply without retrying, the fallback classifier does not classify deliberate silent terminal replies as format failures, and post-tool/error guard cases remain covered.
- What was not tested: Live Zai/provider credentials and a real scheduled heartbeat cadence were not exercised.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: This proof uses embedded-runner/fallback regression coverage with mocked provider attempts on Testbox. It verifies the source-level failure path and guards but not a credentialed live provider transcript.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): Before the fix, the exact `NO_REPLY` full-runner regression failed with `expected undefined to deeply equal [ { text: 'NO_REPLY' } ]` because the explicit silent payload was filtered away without setting `terminalReplyKind: "silent-empty"`.

## Tests and validation

- `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts --testNamePattern "exact NO_REPLY assistant turns|exact silent assistant replies|error or side-effect empty turns|post-tool openai-compatible empty stop|deliberate silent terminal replies" --reporter dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier.test.ts --reporter dot`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` after addressing one accepted finding; final result clean.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox command listed in Real behavior proof.

Regression coverage added:
- helper-level exact `NO_REPLY` silent eligibility
- full-runner exact `NO_REPLY` silent terminal outcome
- errored assistant text guard for `NO_REPLY`
- fallback classifier guard for filtered deliberate silence

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`) Yes

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`) No

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`) No

What is the highest-risk area? Agent terminal outcome classification for silent replies.

How is that risk mitigated? The change is gated by `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent`, keeps the existing side-effect/delivery/post-tool safeguards, adds an explicit errored-assistant guard, and covers the regression plus guard paths in tests.

## Current review state

What is the next action? Maintainer review and CI.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof? CI has not run yet on this draft PR. Live provider heartbeat proof was not run and is noted above as a limitation.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed? Local autoreview found one issue: the first patch could mark errored `NO_REPLY` assistant turns as silent. That guard and regression test were added, and autoreview reran clean.
target.author: sallyom

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
